use_cases: Triggering form submissions with primary or destructive action buttons
Providing navigation options with ghost or link styled buttons
Creating icon-only buttons for compact UI toolbar actions
Building accessible button groups with keyboard navigation support
Implementing polymorphic button patterns using Radix Slot
ai_summary: A polymorphic button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, supporting multiple visual variants (default, outline, ghost, destructive, secondary, link) and sizes. Features standard focus-visible states, disabled handling, and Ring UI accessibility patterns for keyboard navigation. Designed as a reusable atomic input element suitable for any React-based UI system.
